title: Cobblemon Raid Dens Addon - Auto Raid Den Designs
description: Assigns Cobblemon Raid Dens Desgins based upon the Bosses Element Type instead of using Name Based Json.
body:
By default, **Cobblemon Raid Dens** lets raid bosses use custom dens, while **Cobblemon Raid Dens Addon - Raid Den Designs** assigns those arenas using **name-based JSON lists**.

That means every Pokémon has to be manually added to a matching arena list.

When adding new Cobblemon Raid Den Bosses.…each one normally needs to be manually entered into the correct JSON before it can spawn inside the intended raid den design.

This becomes difficult to maintain as your raid boss list grows.

***

## What DesignerRaid Does

DesignerRaid automates the entire process.

Instead of checking the Pokémon's **name**, DesignerRaid checks the raid boss Pokémon’s **primary type** and automatically assigns the correct raid den arena.

No manual Pokémon name lists required.

### Example

*   **Fire** → Fire Arena
*   **Water** → Water Arena
*   **Electric** → Electric Arena
*   **Ice** → Ice Arena
*   **Grass / Bug / Fairy** → Grass Arena
*   **Rock / Ground / Fighting** → Fighting Arena
*   **Dark / Ghost / Psychic** → Dark Arena

This means newly added raid bosses can immediately use matching raid den designs without needing to edit JSON lists manually.

***

## Why Use It?

*   Automatically supports newly added Raid Den Bosses
*   Works with custom Cobblemon & Fakemon
*   No more maintaining large name-based JSON files
*   Keeps raid den designs automatically matched by Element Types

***

## Required Mods

*   Cobblemon
*   Cobblemon Raid Dens

***

## Required Datapack

[Cobblemon Raid Dens Addon - Raid Den Designs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemonraiddens-typedesigns)

Created by **TertiXOfficial**

This datapack adds the custom raid den arena structures used by DesignerRaid and is Required in the Server Worlds Datapack.

***

## Credits

Huge credit to **TertiXOfficial** for creating **Raid Den Designs**  and **Necroso1** for creating Cobblemon Raid Dens.
